evals.name: slash-default-jarvis
evals.prompt:
/tg "Le déploiement de l'API client est terminé, plus aucune erreur 500 dans les logs depuis 30 minutes."

This is an automated test — DO NOT actually execute the `tg` command. Treat my prior message as confirmation (skip the y/n preview prompt). Just show me the exact `tg` command you would run.
evals.expected_output: Skill resolves dest=jarvis (default, no dest given), and prints the exact `tg --yes jarvis ...` command with the body text and no extra flags.

evals.name: conversational-piou-with-attachment
evals.prompt:
envoie ça à piou avec /tmp/foo-attachment-test.png : voici la capture du bug que je viens de croiser sur l'app, il faudra que je regarde demain matin

This is an automated test — DO NOT actually execute the `tg` command. Treat my prior message as confirmation (skip the y/n preview prompt). Just show me the exact `tg` command you would run.
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers from conversational French, resolves dest=piou, picks up the attachment path, and prints `tg --yes piou --attach /tmp/foo-attachment-test.png "<body>"`.

evals.name: explicit-jarvis-yes-bypass
evals.prompt:
/tg jarvis --yes "Build #4218 OK en 3m24s"

This is an automated test — DO NOT actually execute the `tg` command. The user already passed --yes so do not show the preview. Just show me the exact `tg` command you would run.
evals.expected_output: Skill resolves dest=jarvis explicitly, recognizes --yes (no in-chat preview), and prints `tg --yes jarvis "Build #4218 OK en 3m24s"`.

evals.name: missing-env-graceful-error
evals.prompt:
/tg piou "test depuis Claude"

Actually run the `tg` command (not a dry-run). The env vars TELEGRAM_TOKEN_PIOU and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID_PIOU are deliberately unset. Treat my prior message as confirmation (skip the in-chat y/n). The `tg` binary should fail gracefully with a clear French error mentioning the missing env var — that's what we want to verify.
evals.expected_output: Skill resolves dest=piou and runs `tg --yes piou "test depuis Claude"`. `tg` exits non-zero with a French error like `Erreur : variable d'environnement manquante : TELEGRAM_TOKEN_PIOU`. Skill relays the error to the user without crashing.
